providers.label: api.data.gov
providers.summary: Required for the current federal bill, House vote, committee schedule, and FEC finance integrations.
providers.notes: One key powers api.congress.gov-backed sources and FEC OpenFEC. Senate roll-call ingest runs through a separate zero-key source (voteview.com).

providers.label: Local shapefile pipeline
providers.summary: Zero-key default for federal reps-by-address resolution after the cache is primed locally.
providers.notes: Uses Census geocoding, cached district polygons, and the bundled legislator resolver. The cache can be primed automatically during configuration or rep lookup.

providers.label: Geocodio
providers.summary: Optional API-backed upgrade for faster reps-by-address lookup.
providers.notes: Used ahead of the local shapefile resolver when a key is configured.

providers.label: Voteview (voteview.com)
providers.summary: Zero-key tier-2 source for Senate roll-call votes. api.congress.gov has no /senate-vote endpoint, so this fills the gap.
providers.notes: Undocumented web-app API. The adapter tolerates a small error-envelope rate on /api/download, derives session from vote date, and rejects presidential-nomination ids (PN*) from bill linkage so confirmation votes drop out of bill-keyed scoring.

providers.label: Google Civic voterInfoQuery
providers.summary: Key-gated ballot and election-logistics provider — the only ballot source the plugin wires today.
providers.notes: Required for every ballot tool. Per-state SoS adapters were scoped out in v1 after an audit found none of the six candidate states publishes a public address-to-ballot JSON feed; revisit when BallotReady or Democracy Works provides self-serve keys.

providers.label: Candidate and measure bio web search
providers.summary: The guarded adapter shape exists, but the production transport is not wired, so live calls return unavailable.
providers.notes: Tests can inject a fetcher today. Production use still depends on the host skill layer for narrative lookup.

providers.label: Open States
providers.summary: Declared in the plugin config schema but not wired into the current runtime.
providers.notes: No Open States resolver or tool path currently imports this key.

providers.label: LegiScan
providers.summary: Declared in the plugin config schema but not wired into the current runtime.
providers.notes: No LegiScan adapter or tool path currently imports this key.

providers.label: OpenSecrets
providers.summary: Declared in the plugin config schema but not wired into the current runtime.
providers.notes: The candidate research tool intentionally stops at FEC totals today.

providers.label: FollowTheMoney
providers.summary: Declared in the plugin config schema but not wired into the current runtime.
providers.notes: No state-finance adapter currently reads this key.

providers.label: Vote Smart
providers.summary: Declared in the plugin config schema but not wired into the current runtime.
providers.notes: The runtime still routes candidate-bio enrichment through the guarded web-search layer.

providers.label: Democracy Works
providers.summary: Declared in the plugin config schema but not wired into the current runtime.
providers.notes: Ballot logistics currently come from state adapters or Google Civic.

providers.label: Cicero
providers.summary: Declared in the plugin config schema but not wired into the current runtime.
providers.notes: Local and municipal representative coverage is not implemented today.

providers.label: BallotReady
providers.summary: Declared in the plugin config schema but not wired into the current runtime.
providers.notes: Down-ballot commercial coverage is not integrated today.
